name: SLM Corp
summary: SLM Corporation (Sallie Mae) is a consumer banking company focused on private student lending. The company originates private education loans to help students and families fund higher education costs. SLM also pursues loan sales, including through strategic partnerships, and returns capital to shareholders via dividends and share repurchases. The filing references 2026 guidance and a three-year horizon outlook as part of its strategic planning framework.
